name: asic-design-plugins
description: A marketplace for discovering and installing Claude Code plugins

plugins.name: digital-asic-backend
plugins.description: ASIC backend flow automation for Synopsys Fusion Compiler, StarRC, PrimeTime, and VCS. Provides skills for running and managing the complete digital place-and-route, parasitic extraction, timing signoff, ECO convergence, and post-layout simulation workflows.
